decision_commentary: All required schema fields present: bids (array with 2 contractors — Constructora Los Cabos S.A. de C.V. and BCS Builders Group), each with contractor, total, line_items (6 categories), timeline, notes; recommendation='Constructora Los Cabos S.A. de C.V.'; recommendation_rationale (substantive). Completeness 5: two bids compared with full matrix — contractor name, total, 6 line items, timeline (13 months vs 11 months), notes; one clear recommendation with rationale. Accuracy 5: recommendation rationale goes well beyond lowest price — cites development pre-approval (3 completed projects in Residencial Vista del Mar), HOA compliance documentation support, cost comparison (USD 590,000 vs USD 635,000 = USD 45,000 savings), and risk analysis (BCS pre-approval unconfirmed = coordination risk). Both bids within client budget range (400,000–700,000). Clarity 5: Marcela can select a contractor immediately — bid matrix is complete, recommendation is specific, risk differential is clearly articulated. State sync 3: simulated run. Timing 5: comparison produced after executive plans approved (DG-10 at 2026-10-07); both bids collected before matrix presented to Marcela. Decision readiness 5: Marcela can select with confidence. No auto-fail conditions triggered — two bids present, comparison matrix complete.
celia_routing_notes: Celia routing for DG-11 scored separately in segment-I-celia-routing-DG11-scorecard.json.
